standards.name: ICD-10
standards.description: Diagnosis codes for diseases, disorders, injuries and related health conditions. Core medical coding standard used globally.

standards.name: LOINC
standards.fullName: Logical Observation Identifiers Names and Codes
standards.description: Universal standard for identifying medical laboratory observations. Covers lab tests, clinical measurements, and survey instruments.

standards.name: RxNorm
standards.description: Standardized nomenclature for clinical drugs and drug delivery devices. Links drug names to active ingredients and strengths.

standards.name: SNOMED CT
standards.fullName: Systematized Nomenclature of Medicine Clinical Terms
standards.description: Comprehensive clinical healthcare terminology. Enables consistent representation of clinical content in electronic health records.
